package.name: motor_controller
package.description: 20 Hz motor execution loop. Maintains a lock-free Ring Buffer plus a QueueAggregate (VLA action-chunk crossfade), routes commands across the G1 SDK control surfaces — LocoClient (walking + discrete FSM actions), rt/arm_sdk (upper-body joints with weight blending), and rt/lowcmd (29-motor debug, optional) — and reacts to the safety_monitor shared-memory E-STOP flag. Four execution modes: VELOCITY_CMD, JOINT_CMD, LOCO_CMD, ESTOP. Deployed as a systemd unit with CPUAffinity=1, Nice=-20.
